notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.16.11 Cosmic Clarity Correction via CLI call. Updates to missing modules for torch calibration. CC Satellite Remover persistence settings.

Version 1.16.0 through 1.16.10 delivered a major feature wave across SASpro: the Community Sky Atlas launched, allowing users to upload plate-solved images and collectively map the entire sky; PSFViewer received a major overhaul; Workflows gained a Run UI for quick execution; WIMI/WIMS added community image awareness and a Sky Atlas gallery; the Star Alignment engine was completely rewritten with a custom Numba JIT parallel implementation replacing AstroAlign for 2x+ faster registration; GPU-accelerated calibration was added to the Stacking Suite delivering 2-5x speedups; Cosmic Clarity gained mask awareness, aberration correction model support (Correct Only / Correct+Sharpen modes), and numerous inference pipeline fixes including tiling artifact elimination; a detachable Secondary Dock window was added for utility panels with full state persistence across sessions; the Explorer panel gained an active view indicator; ADBE background subtraction was fixed to operate correctly in linear space; the toolbar gained adjustable icon sizes; and mask awareness was extended across Cosmic Clarity, Aberration Remover, SyQon, and Multiscale Decomposition tools, alongside numerous UX, stacking, and stability improvements throughout.
